title: xyris smalliana var. olneyi
intro: Xyris smalliana var. olneyi, also known as Olney's Yellow-eyed Grass, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Xyridaceae. Native to the southeastern United States, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Xyris smalliana var. olneyi include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other infections.
